name: part_011
file: tmp_【 3DLIVE 】#アキロゼ生誕祭2026 ーLife is GAMEー【ホロライブ⧸アキ・ローゼンタール】 [_tBlI-l8WLk]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_011.webm

scenes.description: Aki Rosenthal performs the song 'Katsushika Rhapsody'.

subtitles.original: モノポリー
subtitles.english: Monopoly

subtitles.original: 魅惑の言葉の裏面に忍ばせた
subtitles.english: Embedded on the flip side of captivating words

subtitles.original: 1mgのスパイス
subtitles.english: 1mg of spice

subtitles.original: たちまち華麗な指先で彩る
subtitles.english: Instantly coloring with magnificent fingertips

subtitles.original: 本日のダイス
subtitles.english: Today's dice

subtitles.original: 当たり前だって恐縮してちゃ
subtitles.english: If you're too humble to accept it's only natural

subtitles.original: 生き残れないでしょう
subtitles.english: You won't survive, will you?

subtitles.original: 率直に言って その全てが欲しい
subtitles.english: To be honest, I want it all

subtitles.original: 一人勝ちにオールイン
subtitles.english: All in on a solo win

subtitles.original: どうなっちゃってもいいじゃない
subtitles.english: It doesn't matter what happens

subtitles.original: 際限なんてないじゃない
subtitles.english: There are no limits, right?

subtitles.original: 翻弄して 翻弄されて ゾクゾク
subtitles.english: Toying around, being toyed with, I'm shivering

subtitles.original: 喰らっちゃっても本望でしょ
subtitles.english: Even if you take a hit, it's what you wanted, right?

subtitles.original: 最低だって化けるでしょ
subtitles.english: Even the lowest can transform, right?

subtitles.original: 見透かして 見透かされて 故に終わりはない
subtitles.english: Seeing through, being seen through, therefore there is no end

subtitles.original: 高鳴るこの全てノンフィクション
subtitles.english: All of this thumping heart is non-fiction

subtitles.original: 嗜むはずでも たまには飲みすぎて
subtitles.english: Even if I only meant to enjoy a bit, sometimes I drink too much

subtitles.original: 一回休み
subtitles.english: One turn skip

subtitles.original: 周りもざわつく 思わぬうたた寝で
subtitles.english: The surroundings are also buzzing from an unexpected nap

subtitles.original: 二回休み
subtitles.english: Two turns skip

subtitles.original: 切れる頭と勘だけじゃ
subtitles.english: Something that can't be obtained

subtitles.original: 手に入らないモノ
subtitles.english: just with a sharp mind and intuition

subtitles.original: そこで一打 見越されるならいい
subtitles.english: One stroke there, if it's anticipated, that's fine

subtitles.original: 命懸けで楽しむわ
subtitles.english: I'll enjoy it with my life on the line

subtitles.original: 天と地は案外近くない？ この通り命懸け
subtitles.english: Aren't heaven and earth unexpectedly close? Just like this, life on the line

subtitles.original: たかがモノポリー されど大勝負
subtitles.english: It's just Monopoly, but it's a big gamble

subtitles.original: 決める 想いで今宵の 私は強い
subtitles.english: Deciding with these feelings, tonight I am strong

subtitles.original: どうなっちゃってもいいじゃない
subtitles.english: It doesn't matter what happens

subtitles.original: 際限なんてないじゃない
subtitles.english: There are no limits, right?

subtitles.original: 翻弄して 翻弄されて ゾクゾク
subtitles.english: Toying around, being toyed with, I'm shivering

subtitles.original: 喰らっちゃっても本望でしょ
subtitles.english: Even if you take a hit, it's what you wanted, right?

subtitles.original: 最低だって化けるでしょ
subtitles.english: Even the lowest can transform, right?

subtitles.original: 見透かして 見透かされて 故に終わりはない
subtitles.english: Seeing through, being seen through, therefore there is no end

subtitles.original: 高鳴るこの全てノンフィクション
subtitles.english: All of this thumping heart is non-fiction

subtitles.original: 堕ちても 昇っても ノンフィクション
subtitles.english: Whether falling or rising, it's non-fiction

subtitles.original: 葛飾ラプソディー
subtitles.english: Katsushika Rhapsody

subtitles.original: 中川に浮かぶ 夕陽をめがけて
subtitles.english: Aiming for the setting sun floating in the Nakagawa River

subtitles.original: 小石を蹴ったら 靴まで飛んで
subtitles.english: When I kicked a pebble, even my shoe flew off

subtitles.original: ジョギングしていた 大工の頭に
subtitles.english: And hit the master carpenter who was jogging

subtitles.original: ガキのままだと 笑われたのさ
subtitles.english: I was laughed at, told I'm still a kid

subtitles.original: どこかに元気を 落っことしても 葛飾亀有
subtitles.english: Even if you drop your energy somewhere, Katsushika Kameari

subtitles.original: あくびをひとつ 変わらない街並みが 妙に優しいよ
subtitles.english: With a yawn, the unchanging cityscape is strangely kind

subtitles.original: 中央広場で 子供の手を引く
subtitles.english: In the central plaza, leading a child by the hand

subtitles.original: 太ったあの娘は 初恋の人
subtitles.english: That girl who got plump was my first love

subtitles.original: ゴンパチ池で 渡したラブレター
subtitles.english: The love letter I gave her at Gonpachi Pond

subtitles.original: 今も持ってる と からかわれたよ
subtitles.english: I was teased, being told she still has it

subtitles.original: 何にもいいこと なかったけど 葛飾水元
subtitles.english: Nothing good ever happened, but Katsushika Mizumoto

subtitles.original: 流れる雲と ラプソディー口ずさみ 少し歩こうか
subtitles.english: Singing a rhapsody with the floating clouds, shall we walk a bit?

subtitles.original: カラスがなくから もう日が暮れるね
subtitles.english: The crows are cawing, so the sun is setting

subtitles.original: 焼き鳥ほうばり ビール飲もか
subtitles.english: Let's stuff our faces with yakitori and drink beer

subtitles.original: トンガリ帽子の 取水塔から
subtitles.english: From the intake tower with the pointed hat

subtitles.original: 大志を抱いて 夕陽が落ちる
subtitles.english: With great ambition, the setting sun goes down
